sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY, MAX(T2.MAX_TEMPERATURE_C) FROM DIM_STATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_THERMAL AS T2 ON T1.STATION_ID = T2.STATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.YEAR = T3.YEAR WHERE T3.YEAR = 2023 GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY HAVING MAX(T2.MAX_TEMPERATURE_C) > (SELECT AVG(MAX_TEMPERATURE_C) FROM FACT_THERMAL) ORDER BY MAX(T2.MAX_TEMPERATURE_C) DESC

question: List the station names for stations where either the maximum temperature in Celsius was greater than 30.0 during the year 2023, or the type of water body associated with the station is a lake.
sql: SELECT T1.STATION_NAME FROM DIM_STATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_THERMAL AS T2 ON T1.STATION_ID = T2.STATION_ID WHERE T2.MAX_TEMPERATURE_C > 30.0 AND T2.YEAR = 2023 OR T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY = 'LAKE';
